name: 90 Minute Cinnamon Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Set aside 1 cup of flour.
2. In a large bowl, mix the remaining flour, yeast, sugar, and salt.
3. Heat milk, water, and 1/4 cup butter to 105-115°F (40-46°C).
4. Gradually stir liquids into flour mixture until combined.
5. Stir in the egg.
6. Add enough reserved flour to form a soft dough that does not stick to the bowl.
7. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead for 5 minutes.
8. Cover dough and let rest for 10 minutes.
9. In a separate bowl, mix brown sugar, cinnamon, and softened butter (up to 1 1/2 times the given amount for extra sticky buns).
10. Gently roll the dough into a 12" x 9-inch rectangle.
11. Spread with the cinnamon mixture and sprinkle raisins if desired.
12. Roll up from the long side, pinching to seal the seam.
13. Cut into 12 equal pieces using a sharp knife.
14. Place cut sides up in greased muffin tins.
15. Place the muffin pan on a baking sheet atop a large shallow pan half-filled with boiling water.
16. Cover dough and let rise for 20 minutes.
17. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20 minutes or until browned.
18. Remove from muffin tins immediately to cool.
19. Serve warm!
